PSSMC Research Website Blueprint

Page 1: Front Page / Landing
- Title: Predictive Sliding Mode Control
- CTA Primary: Enter Research
- CTA Secondary: Open Document (placeholder for future PDF)
- Metrics: creative scientific summary
- Intro paragraph by assistant
- Academic-tech palette: white, milky, light brown
- Big vivid Georgia-style headings

Page 2: Gateway
- Heading: Research Pathway
- Center CTA: Explore Study
- Layout: Pentagon stage map
- Steps 1-3 active
- Steps 4-5 under construction

Pages
- steps/step-1.html
- steps/step-2.html
- steps/step-3.html
- steps/step-4.html (under construction)
- steps/step-5.html (under construction)

Interactions
- Top stage navigation on step pages
- Clickable defined terms => floating overlay panel with blur backdrop
- Equations behind buttons => overlay with explanation
- Interactive graphs with zoom/pan/hover
- Home and Back buttons
- Folder-based maintainable structure

Front Page Sections Confirmed
- Hero
- Metrics band
- Why this matters
- Preview strip using Option 3:
  * Three completed cards
  * Two muted coming soon cards
- Footer identity: FShuma

Confirmed Labels
- Gateway heading: Research Pathway
- Gateway center CTA: Explore Study
